WaitlistEntryAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class converts the list of Events that a User has into a displayable format
WaitlistEntryAdapter(Context, List<WaitlistEntryItem>) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.WaitlistEntryAdapter
This initializes the adapter with all of the WaitlistEntryItem for the User
WaitlistEntryItem - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that represents and event that a User is on a Waitlist for
WaitlistEntryItem(String, String, Date, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.WaitlistEntryItem
This creates the waitlist entry Object
WinningLotteryNotificationTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventNotificationTest
tests that a chosen entrant receives a winning notification after the lottery draw
